scripts.docs:openapi: DJANGO_DEBUG=False python3 ../manage.py spectacular --file openapi/openapi.yaml --validate && python3 ../scripts/split_openapi_by_tag.py openapi/openapi.yaml Webhooks openapi/webhooks.yaml && DJANGO_DEBUG=True python3 ../manage.py spectacular --file /tmp/netcred-openapi-debug.yaml && python3 ../scripts/split_openapi_by_tag.py /tmp/netcred-openapi-debug.yaml Company openapi/company.yaml
scripts.docs:lint: npm run docs:openapi && redocly lint netcred@v1
scripts.docs:build-api: npm run docs:openapi && redocly build-docs netcred@v1 --output redoc-static.html
